narrative:
Morrow County has 23,974 registered voters, with 50.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.4 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.4% of registrants.
